name: Flowborn (Mage)

skills.name: Flow of the World
skills.description:
Can change Flow states at the Base to enhance stats.
Spends 1 stack of Flow to perform an enhanced Basic Attack that deals area damage.

skills.name: Convergence
skills.description:
Channels the Flow, reducing the cooldown of other skills by 50%. Also gains 5–9 stacks of Flow based on the number of nearby heroes and minions and recovers Health based on Flow stacks.
Damages and knocks back nearby enemies (without applying crowd control).

skills.name: Flow Formation
skills.description:
Deals damage and slows enemies within range, then deals damage over time.
Using the skill repeatedly within a short time enhances it, dealing damage and launching or stunning enemies. When new magic circles overlap with the initial one, they increase its damage and refresh its duration.
Can spend 4 stacks of Flow to use the skill without triggering cooldown.

skills.name: Arcane Arts
skills.description:
Continuously channels a beam to deal damage over time.
While the beam is linked with a hero, continuously throws Energy Bombs that deal area damage.
Can spend 5 stacks of Flow to stop the skill from entering cooldown after this use.

tips: Flowborn (Mage) is a Medium Mage (Mid Lane) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier B with 51.4% win rate and 0.6% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
Best build path: Boots of the Arcane → Sage's Tome → Frozen Breath → Blood Clan's Grimoire → Insatiable Tome → Nebulon Wood.
Run Fate, Penetration for stats that match Flowborn (Mage)'s Mage kit. Take Flash & Execute — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
Standard trade: Convergence → Flow Formation → Arcane Arts → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.
Laning: Control first wave without taking free poke. Roam after pushing wave 2–4 to side lanes with your jungler.
Teamfight: Poke from max range before objective. Save hard CC for enemy dive or your carry peel window.
Flowborn (Mage) excels into Athena, Zilong, Pei. Avoid blind picking into Li Xin, Kaizer, Dun without team peel.
Flowborn (Mage) sits at Tier B globally (51.4% WR). In high rank, pick only into favorable matchups or when you have a dedicated pocket pick.

faqs.question: Is Flowborn (Mage) good in the current meta?
faqs.answer: Flowborn (Mage) is Tier B Mage with 51.4% win rate, 0.6% pick rate, and 0.1% ban rate on Honor of Kings Global (Camp HOK, 2026-06-05). Niche — draft carefully.

faqs.question: What is the best Flowborn (Mage) build?
faqs.answer: Core item path: Boots of the Arcane, Sage's Tome, Frozen Breath, Blood Clan's Grimoire, Insatiable Tome, Nebulon Wood. Run Fate, Penetration arcana with Flash & Execute. Switch to alternate build presets on this page for jungle, clash, or late-game setups.

faqs.question: How to counter Flowborn (Mage)?
faqs.answer: Pick Li Xin, Kaizer, Dun into Flowborn (Mage). Deny Mid Lane resources early and force fights before Flowborn (Mage) completes core items. Flowborn (Mage) struggles when the enemy can out-range or out-sustain them.

faqs.question: Who does Flowborn (Mage) counter?
faqs.answer: Flowborn (Mage) is strong into Athena, Zilong, Pei according to HoKStats matchup data and role matchups on the global server. Draft Flowborn (Mage) when the enemy relies on these heroes in the Mid Lane lane.

faqs.question: Is Flowborn (Mage) good in high rank / Diamond+?
faqs.answer: Flowborn (Mage) sits at Tier B globally (51.4% WR). In high rank, pick only into favorable matchups or when you have a dedicated pocket pick.

faqs.question: What lane should Flowborn (Mage) play?
faqs.answer: Flowborn (Mage) is tagged Mid Lane in Camp export (Mage). Control first wave without taking free poke. Roam after pushing wave 2–4 to side lanes with your jungler.

faqs.question: Best arcana and spells for Flowborn (Mage)?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Fate, Penetration arcana. Battle spell: Flash & Execute. Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive and jungle need.

faqs.question: Flowborn (Mage) or Daji — which is better?
faqs.answer: Flowborn (Mage) vs Daji (Mage, Tier S+): Daji is 2.4% pick / 51.0% WR. Flowborn (Mage) has +0.4% WR vs Daji in Camp data. Choose Flowborn (Mage) when you need Mid Lane identity; choose Daji for Mid Lane comfort.

faqs.question: Should I ban Flowborn (Mage)?
faqs.answer: Low priority ban (0.1%). Focus bans on higher-tier Mage picks unless targeting a one-trick.
